title: campanula fenestrellata subsp. istriaca
intro:
Campanula fenestrellata subsp. istriaca, also known as Istrian fensterbell campanula, is a rare, alpine plant species belonging to the Campanulaceae family, characterized by its bell-shaped flowers in shades of blue and white.

This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Campanula fenestrellata subsp. istriaca include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures.
